per_criterion_scores.internal_note: The student provided some clear and effective correction commands but lacked specificity and detail in others.
The student demonstrated a good understanding of sorting and searching concepts but could have applied them more effectively in the correction commands.
The student failed to iterate and refine the correction commands adequately across multiple cycles, leading to premature conclusion.

justification: The student's inability to iterate and refine correction commands adequately, despite showing some understanding of key concepts, leads to an unsatisfactory performance in steering.
